app.title: 灵台
error.agent_timeout: Agent failed to start. Check logs at %s
firstrun.dir_exists: Folder '%s' already exists. Choose another name.
firstrun.custom_cost_warn: ⚠ Lingtai agents burn hundreds of millions of tokens. You are solely responsible for all API costs.
firstrun.no_presets: No presets found. Let's set up.
firstrun.pick_preset: Pick a preset for your orchestrator:
firstrun.caps_recommend: Highly recommended to select all, especially on first run.
firstrun.caps_change_later: Use /setup and /refresh in chat to change later.
firstrun.addons_section: Add-ons — ask the agent to help you set up after creation
firstrun.cap_desc.file:
Read, write, edit, glob, and grep files.
The agent's hands on your filesystem. Scoped to its working directory by default.
firstrun.cap_desc.email:
Full email client — send, receive, reply, search, archive.
Needs an IMAP/SMTP account via the imap add-on, or a Gmail OAuth credential.
firstrun.cap_desc.bash:
Run shell commands with guardrails.
Lets the agent install tools, run scripts, and probe the system. Destructive commands require confirmation.
firstrun.cap_desc.web_search:
Search the web for up-to-date information.
Backend is chosen per provider — see the provider list on the right.
firstrun.cap_desc.psyche:
Evolving identity, memory, and context management.
The agent updates its own character and compresses context via molt. Highly recommended.
firstrun.cap_desc.library:
Long-term knowledge archive.
Submit, filter, consolidate, and export notes. Survives molts — the agent's cumulative memory.
firstrun.cap_desc.vision:
Understand images.
The agent can read screenshots, photos, diagrams, and scanned documents.
firstrun.cap_desc.talk:
Text-to-speech.
Lets the agent generate audio replies. Requires a TTS-capable provider (see list on the right).
firstrun.cap_desc.draw:
Generate images from text prompts.
Useful for visualizations, drafts, and storyboards. Requires an image-capable provider.
firstrun.cap_desc.compose:
Generate music from text prompts.
Produces short instrumental or vocal clips. Requires a music-capable provider.
firstrun.cap_desc.video:
Generate short videos from text or image prompts.
Jobs are async and can take minutes. Requires a video-capable provider.
firstrun.cap_desc.listen:
Analyze audio — transcribe speech and appreciate music.
Useful for voice notes, meetings, and audio files. Defaults to a local whisper model.
firstrun.cap_desc.web_read:
Fetch and extract the content of web pages.
Gives the agent the ability to actually read articles found via web_search.
firstrun.cap_desc.avatar:
Spawn independent sub-agents (avatars).
Each avatar is a full agent in its own directory, running as a separate process. Ideal for long-running subtasks.
firstrun.cap_desc.daemon:
Spawn short-lived parallel workers.
Lighter than avatars — for fan-out work like "summarize these ten files in parallel".
firstrun.cap_desc.skills:
Use installed skill packs.
Skills are markdown playbooks the agent can load on demand, similar to Claude Code skills.
firstrun.addon_desc.imap:
Connect any IMAP/SMTP mailbox.
Enables the email capability against Gmail, Outlook, Fastmail, etc. You'll provide host, username, and an app password.
firstrun.addon_desc.telegram:
Talk to the agent from Telegram.
Create a bot via @BotFather and paste its token. Optionally restrict to specific user IDs.
firstrun.addon_desc.feishu:
Talk to the agent from Feishu (Lark).
Create an enterprise self-built app at open.feishu.cn/app and paste its credentials.
welcome.title: Lingtai Orchestration

editor_warn.change_hint: Set EDITOR env var to change (e.g. export EDITOR=nano).

mail.no_messages: No messages yet. Waiting for mail...
mail.clearing: Clearing agent context window and restarting...
addon.title: Addons
addon.readonly_desc: Addon configs live at .lingtai/.addons/<addon>/config.json — shared across all agents in this project. Edit the file directly, then /refresh.
addon.not_configured: Not configured — ask the agent to help set it up (it has a skill for this)
addon.parse_error: Config file exists but is not valid JSON: %s
addon.footer_hint: Edit config files, then /refresh to apply changes
addon.saved: Addon config viewed. Type /refresh to apply changes.
palette.btw: Ask the agent a side question
palette.clear: Clear agent context window and restart
palette.refresh: Hard restart agent (/refresh all for all)
palette.sleep: Put agent to sleep (/sleep all for all)
settings.title: Settings
insight.auto_question: You are producing insights for the human operator. Based on everything in this conversation — the task, the context, domain knowledge, risks, and opportunities — produce exactly 2-3 bullet points of things the human would benefit from knowing. Each bullet should be a concrete, specific insight: a pattern you've noticed, relevant background knowledge, a risk they may not see, or an opportunity to explore. Format: start each bullet with '- ' on its own line. No preamble, no summary — just the bullets.
settings.language_desc: TUI display language. Changes take effect immediately.
settings.mail_page_size_desc: Max messages shown in the mail view. Larger = more scroll history.
settings.theme_desc: Color theme for the TUI interface.
settings.insights_desc: Auto-generate insights after each task. Use /insights for one-time.
settings.agent_lang_desc: Language the agent speaks. Requires /refresh to take effect.
settings.nickname_desc: Agents will address you by this name.
settings.agent_name_desc: Display name for the agent. Requires /refresh to take effect.
settings.nickname_hint: agents will address you by this name
setup.enter_new_or_empty: Enter new key or leave empty to keep current
setup.title: Configure
setup.saved_refresh: Settings saved. Use /refresh for changes to take effect.

nirvana.warning: ⚠ This will permanently destroy all data in the working directory.
nirvana.detail: All agents, mail history, configuration, and files will be permanently removed. You will return to the initial setup.

skills.title: Skills
palette.agora: Browse published networks (/agora publish to start publishing)
projects.title: Projects
agora.title: Agora — Published Networks
agora.no_agent: [system] No orchestrator running — start an agent first.
agora.publish_sent: [system] Asked the orchestrator to start the publishing flow.
agora.publish_prompt: The human wants to publish this network. Use the lingtai-agora skill to walk them through the process. Start by greeting the human via email and explaining what you're about to do.
recipe.title: Choose a launch recipe
recipe.hint: Recipes shape what your orchestrator says and how it behaves on launch.
recipe.desc.greeter: Standard welcome. Your orchestrator greets you and helps with whatever you need.
recipe.desc.plain: Silent launch. No greeting, no comment. For power users.
recipe.desc.adaptive: Minimal greeting. Features revealed progressively as you work.
recipe.desc.tutorial: Your orchestrator teaches you how lingtai works, one concept at a time.
recipe.desc.custom: Use your own greet.md and comment.md from a folder.
recipe.custom_path: Folder path (must contain greet.md and/or comment.md):
recipe.swap_hint: Changing from '%s' to '%s'. How should this apply?
recipe.swap_inplace_desc: Update the comment file and queue a new greet. Existing network preserved.
recipe.swap_fresh_desc: Destroy the current network and start over with the new recipe. Irreversible.
